subject: [PATCH v4 18/21] memcg: swap: only charge physical swap slots

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's memory cgroup (memcg) swap handling to only charge physical swap slots, rather than virtual swap slots. This change is made because zswap and zero-filled swap page optimization no longer occupy physical swap space. The patch introduces new functions for recording and clearing swap charges in memcgs, and updates existing code to use these new functions. The goal of this patch is to improve the accuracy of swap usage and limit calculations in memcgs.
